inicio.tesoro_amarillo: Ecuador's Yellow Treasure to the world
inicio.transporte_parr: Fruit transport is a key stage in the agricultural process, as it allows the harvest to be moved efficiently from the farm to distribution centers or markets. To achieve this, appropriate means of transport are used to help preserve the freshness and quality of the product during transit. A good transport system facilitates marketing, optimizes delivery times, and ensures that the fruit arrives in excellent condition at its final destination.
inicio.text_uno: The yellow pitaya is one of the most prized exotic fruits in Latin America, renowned for its sweet flavor, refreshing pulp, and striking appearance. This fruit comes from a climbing cactus belonging to the genus Selenicereus, which thrives primarily in warm, tropical climates. Its bright yellow peel, covered in small, soft spines, protects a white pulp filled with tiny, edible black seeds, offering a smooth texture and a delicately sweet taste that makes it a highly valued fruit in both local and international markets.
inicio.text_dos: In Andean countries like Ecuador and Colombia, yellow pitaya has found ideal growing conditions thanks to the combination of altitude, temperature, and fertile soils. Ecuador, in particular, has established itself as one of the world's leading exporters of yellow pitaya, taking this fruit to international markets such as the United States, Europe, and Asia. The country's agricultural areas boast a privileged climate that allows for the production of high-quality fruit, characterized by its natural sweetness, freshness, and excellent presentation for export.
inicio.text_tres: Pitaya cultivation also represents a significant opportunity for the agricultural and economic development of many rural regions. Its production generates employment, and Premium Farms S.A. promotes sustainable agriculture and strengthens the presence of producing countries in international markets. Thanks to its growing global demand, yellow pitaya continues to position itself as an emblematic export fruit, a symbol of the natural and agricultural wealth of the Andean region.
frutas.exp_seccion_desc: Discover the perfect balance between wild beauty and unparalleled flavor. Our premium selection of pitaya redefines natural, bringing to your table a nutritional gem packed with antioxidants and extreme freshness. It's not just fruit; it's a tropical experience designed for those who demand more than the ordinary. The taste of paradise awaits you here.
frutas.pitayaDesc: The yellow pitaya (Selenicereus megalanthus) is known for being the sweetest and most aromatic variety, distinguishable by its vibrant yellow skin and its ovoid shape, which is smaller than the red variety. Its translucent white pulp contains numerous edible black seeds, and its flavor combines intense sweetness with notes of kiwi and pear, making it ideal for eating fresh, in smoothies, or as a dessert garnish. This fruit is beneficial for digestive health thanks to its high fiber content and provides antioxidants, calcium, phosphorus, and iron.
frutas.bananaDesc: Bananas (Solara). Their key characteristics include a uniform cylindrical shape, a minimum length of approximately 20 cm, and a diameter of between 39 and 47 mm, ensuring optimal ripeness. The peel changes from deep green to bright yellow without blemishes. Organoleptically, the banana has a creamy, firm, and fiberless pulp with a sweet flavor that reaches between 20 and 22 °Brix at full maturity. Post-harvest handling involves rigorous processes such as refrigerated transport (13 °C-14 °C) and advanced packaging, extending the shelf life to up to 30 days.
frutas.cacaoDesc: Cacao (Theobroma cacao) is a tropical plant renowned for its botanical structure and culinary value. The tree reaches an average height of 6 meters, growing in the shade, with elliptical leaves up to 50 cm long. One of its most intriguing features is its cauliflory: small pink flowers sprout directly from the trunk and older branches, giving way to an oval pod (15 to 30 cm) that changes color as it ripens and protects between 30 and 50 seeds encased in a sweet mucilage.
frutas.camaronDesc: Shrimp, especially the Penaeus vannamei species, which is the leading export from Ecuador, is a decapod crustacean of high nutritional and culinary value. It is distinguished by its body, which is divided into a cephalothorax, a fleshy abdomen, and a telson. In its natural state, it has translucent, grayish tones, but when cooked, it acquires a bright pink or orange color and a firm, juicy texture with a sweet flavor and a fresh, sea-like aroma. This food is an excellent source of lean protein, Omega-3 fatty acids, astaxanthin, and essential minerals such as iodine and zinc, which promote cardiovascular and visual health. In the market, it is classified by size according to units per pound and is mainly sold in varieties such as white (Vannamei), pink (wild-caught), and giant tiger shrimp, all recognized for their versatility and superior organoleptic quality.
fincas.terreno: Discover a selection of farms with unique characteristics and great potential. Each property offers a privileged natural setting, ample space, and multiple possibilities for agricultural, tourism, or investment projects. Explore their features and envision the opportunities each one can offer.
fincas.montanias: Surrounded by mountains and nature, the area offers favorable climatic conditions that benefit the development of various fruit crops. The altitude, humidity, and rich soil create an ideal environment for natural production of excellent quality.
fincas.zonasverdes: The farm's green areas play a fundamental role in the land's productivity. The natural vegetation, along with the soil conditions and the ecosystem's balance, promotes moisture retention, soil protection, and healthy crop development. These areas contribute to creating an environment conducive to planting and harvesting various fruits, allowing for sustainable and high-quality agricultural production.
fincas.alrededores: The farm's surroundings offer spaces designed for both agricultural productivity and the well-being of its visitors. There are ample green areas, rest areas, and meeting spaces ideal for spending time with family or work teams. In addition, recreational areas are common, complementing the natural environment and creating a harmonious atmosphere where agricultural production and community life are integrated into one place.
fincas.manantial: These lands also feature natural springs that rise from the earth and flow continuously across the property. These water sources contribute to the ecosystem's balance, promote soil moisture, and represent a valuable resource for crop irrigation. In addition to supporting agricultural production, the springs bring freshness to the surroundings and enrich the natural landscape, making them one of the most cherished features of the property.
fincas.estructuras: Within these spaces, one can also find various structures and buildings that facilitate both agricultural work and movement within the property. These include small bridges, internal roads, cellars, storage areas, and buildings designed for working with and maintaining crops. These structures complement the natural environment and allow for better use of space, providing functionality and organization to the property.
pitahaya.legado_desc: With over 40 years of experience in Ecuador, our essence unites Chinese business acumen with a deep respect for the Ecuadorian land. We are experts in connecting the richness of the Amazon with the highest standards of the global market.
pitahaya.origen_desc: We select the best microclimates in Palora and collaborate with elite farmers. Thanks to the unique light of the equatorial line and volcanic soils, our Yellow Dragon Fruit offers unparalleled sweetness (Brix) and texture, specifically designed to satisfy the most discerning palates in Asia and around the world.
pitahaya.garantia_desc_1: Our logistical expertise and rigorous phytosanitary standards ensure world-class quality fruit.
pitahaya.garantia_desc_2: Expert Handling: Specialists in export protocols to China, Europe, the USA and the Middle East.
pitahaya.garantia_desc_3: Total Safety: Strict sanitary processes at every stage.
pitahaya.garantia_desc_4: Commitment: Ultra Premium quality, guaranteed traceability and environmental respect.
pitahaya.perfil_desc: (Selenicereus megalanthus) This fruit, also known worldwide as Yellow Dragon Fruit, is covered by a layer of spines that are removed before marketing. Its pulp is white, full of tiny black seeds that have digestive and diuretic properties and a spectacular sweet taste.
pitahaya.beneficios_desc_1: Natural Antioxidant Boost: Rich in vitamin C and antioxidants that protect cells and support overall health.
pitahaya.beneficios_desc_2: Healthy Digestion: High fiber content promotes intestinal transit and digestive well-being.
pitahaya.beneficios_desc_3: Prebiotic Support: Nourishes the good bacteria in the gut and strengthens the immune system.
pitahaya.beneficios_desc_4: Delicious Hydration: Composed of 80–90% water, ideal for keeping the body hydrated.
pitahaya.beneficios_desc_5: Electrolyte Balance: Provides potassium and magnesium for more complete hydration.
pitahaya.beneficios_desc_6: Anti-inflammatory Effect: Its natural compounds help reduce inflammation and promote well-being.
pitahaya.beneficios_desc_7: Blood Sugar Control: Low glycemic index, ideal for balanced diets.
pitahaya.beneficios_desc_8: Healthy and Radiant Skin: Stimulates collagen and combats cellular aging.
pitahaya.beneficios_desc_9: Brain Health Support: Its antioxidants help protect the brain and cognitive function.
